message:
Improve test hygiene: rename shadowing variables, replace panics with assert_with_log

Three test-only cleanups across the codebase:

- symbol_cancel.rs: Rename local `token` variables to `cancel_token` in
  all test functions to avoid shadowing the module-level `token` import
  and improve readability when debugging test failures (the variable name
  now clearly indicates it is a SymbolCancelToken, not a generic token)

- channel/mpsc.rs: Replace bare `panic!("unexpected recv error: ...")` in
  the ordered-delivery test with `assert_with_log!` macro and a graceful
  break, so test failures produce structured diagnostics instead of
  unwinding without context

- epoch.rs: Simplify test_epoch_select_left assertion from a match-arm
  with nested assert_with_log to a single `matches!` + assert_with_log,
  reducing nesting and making the expected outcome more explicit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
